data.task_objective: Implement email notification module for sending interview invitations and follow-ups

data.result:
```python
import smtplib
from email.mime.text import MIMEText
from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart

class EmailNotification:
    def __init__(self, sender_email, sender_password, smtp_server, smtp_port):
        """
        Initializes the EmailNotification module.

        Args:
            sender_email (str): The email address of the sender.
            sender_password (str): The password of the sender's email account.
            smtp_server (str): The SMTP server address (e.g., 'smtp.gmail.com').
            smtp_port (int): The SMTP port number (e.g., 587).
        """
        self.sender_email = sender_email
        self.sender_password = sender_password
        self.smtp_server = smtp_server
        self.smtp_port = smtp_port

    def send_email(self, recipient_email, subject, body, is_html=False):
        """
        Sends an email to the specified recipient.

        Args:
            recipient_email (str): The email address of the recipient.
            subject (str): The subject of the email.
            body (str): The body of the email.
            is_html (bool): Indicates if the body is HTML formatted. Defaults to False.
        """
        msg = MIMEMultipart()
        msg['From'] = self.sender_email
        msg['To'] = recipient_email
        msg['Subject'] = subject

        if is_html:
            msg.attach(MIMEText(body, 'html'))
        else:
            msg.attach(MIMEText(body, 'plain'))

        try:
            server = smtplib.SMTP(self.smtp_server, self.smtp_port)
            server.starttls()  # Secure the connection
            server.login(self.sender_email, self.sender_password)
            server.sendmail(self.sender_email, recipient_email, msg.as_string())
            server.quit()
            print(f"Email sent successfully to {recipient_email}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Error sending email: {e}")

    def send_interview_invitation(self, recipient_email, candidate_name, job_title, date_time, meeting_link):
         """
         Sends an interview invitation email to the candidate.

         Args:
            recipient_email (str): The email address of the candidate.
            candidate_name (str): The name of the candidate.
            job_title (str): The title of the job the candidate is applying for.
            date_time (str): The date and time of the interview.
            meeting_link (str): The link to the online meeting.
         """

         subject = f"Interview Invitation for {job_title} at [Your Company]"
         body = f"""
         Dear {candidate_name},

         We are pleased to invite you to an interview for the {job_title} position at [Your Company].

         Date and Time: {date_time}
         Meeting Link: {meeting_link}

         Please confirm your availability by replying to this email.

         We look forward to speaking with you.

         Sincerely,
         [Your Name]
         [Your Title]
         [Your Company]
         """
         self.send_email(recipient_email, subject, body)

    def send_interview_followup(self, recipient_email, candidate_name):
        """
        Sends a follow-up email to the candidate after the interview.

        Args:
            recipient_email (str): The email address of the candidate.
            candidate_name (str): The name of the candidate.
        """
        subject = "Following Up on Your Interview at [Your Company]"
        body = f"""
        Dear {candidate_name},

        Thank you for taking the time to interview with us for the [Job Title] position.

        We appreciate you sharing your experience and qualifications with us.  We are currently reviewing all candidates and will be in touch soon with an update on your application.

        In the meantime, please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

        Sincerely,
        [Your Name]
        [Your Title]
        [Your Company]
        """
        self.send_email(recipient_email, subject, body)

    def send_rejection_email(self, recipient_email, candidate_name, job_title):
        """Sends a rejection email to a candidate.

        Args:
            recipient_email (str): The email address of the candidate.
            candidate_name (str): The name of the candidate.
            job_title (str): The job title the candidate applied for.
        """

        subject = f"Update on Your Application for {job_title} at [Your Company]"
        body = f"""
        Dear {candidate_name},

        Thank you for your interest in the {job_title} position at [Your Company] and for taking the time to interview with us.

        After careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with other candidates whose qualifications and experience more closely align with the requirements of this role.

        This was a difficult decision, as we were impressed with many aspects of your background. We wish you the best of luck in your job search.

        Sincerely,
        [Your Name]
        [Your Title]
        [Your Company]
        """
        self.send_email(recipient_email, subject, body)

    def send_offer_email(self, recipient_email, candidate_name, job_title, salary, start_date):
        """Sends an offer email to a candidate.

        Args:
            recipient_email (str): The email address of the candidate.
            candidate_name (str): The name of the candidate.
            job_title (str): The job title for the offer.
            salary (str): The salary being offered.
            start_date (str): The start date for the position.
        """

        subject = f"Job Offer: {job_title} at [Your Company]"
        body = f"""
        Dear {candidate_name},

        We are pleased to offer you the position of {job_title} at [Your Company]!

        We were very impressed with your qualifications and believe you would be a valuable asset to our team.

        Your starting salary will be {salary} per year, and your start date will be {start_date}.

        Please review the attached offer letter for more details. We would appreciate it if you could let us know your decision by [Date].

        We are excited about the possibility of you joining our team!

        Sincerely,
        [Your Name]
        [Your Title]
        [Your Company]
        """
        self.send_email(recipient_email, subject, body)



if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage (Replace with your actual credentials and information)
    sender_email = "your_email@gmail.com"  # Replace with your email address
    sender_password = "your_password"  # Replace with your email password (or app password)
    smtp_server = "smtp.gmail.com"  # Or your SMTP server
    smtp_port = 587  # Or your SMTP port

    email_module = EmailNotification(sender_email, sender_password, smtp_server, smtp_port)

    # Example 1: Send an interview invitation
    recipient_email = "candidate@example.com"
    candidate_name = "John Doe"
    job_title = "Software Engineer"
    date_time = "October 27, 2023, 10:00 AM"
    meeting_link = "https://meet.google.com/xyz"
    email_module.send_interview_invitation(recipient_email, candidate_name, job_title, date_time, meeting_link)

    # Example 2: Send an interview follow-up
    email_module.send_interview_followup(recipient_email, candidate_name)

    # Example 3: Send a rejection email
    email_module.send_rejection_email(recipient_email, candidate_name, job_title)

    # Example 4: Send an offer email
    email_module.send_offer_email(recipient_email, candidate_name, job_title, "$120,000", "November 15, 2023")
```
